programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Its roundup time at the Harts ranch but Jonathan and Jennifer are distracted by dying animals a rumored chemical spill and a murder

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney becomes obsessed with busting a gentlemanly and famous jewel thief from years back

programme.title: Starsky 219
programme.desc: Starsky 219

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke meets a mercenary who claims to have information regarding his missing brother

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: OPReEpisode709SD
programme.desc: OPReEpisode709SD

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Addams 204
programme.desc: Addams 204

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Amos mocks Georges painting cheap junk dealer Daggett pays twenty dollars for a painting by George at the McCoy farm so Amos encourages Georges painting to be his manager unaware that Daggett has actually paid for the frame

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke tries to sweeten the McCoy bankroll - by selling barn perfume

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Rifleman 518
programme.desc: Rifleman 518

programme.title: Rifleman
programme.desc: Rifleman

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A wounded robber is suspected of murder and forces Kimble to treat him but Kimble doesnt believe he killed anyone

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After teenager Adam is coerced into having a one-night-stand with Loni a girl he meets at a party he finds that shes looking for a more permanent relationship Meanwhile Adams friend Max is forced to abandon his planned summer trip and take a job in a pizza place working under his creepy tyrannical uncle

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A troubled investigator looks into the suicide of a priest in an abandoned convent

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A figure from Nicks past complicates a murder investigation forcing him to choose between reconciling his past and preventing yet another murder

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A native American doctor discovers a unique way to cure terminally ill patients but the price of the treatment is murder

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A tormented young artist freaks when his latest cartoon The Phantom leaps from the page to do his bidding Meanwhile after undergoing a traumatic experience a claustrophobic is driven to the brink of madness

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Scandal erupts when a 30-year-old photo of Flora clad in a scanty swimsuit winds up in a local publication

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wagers Kates prize hen Jenny on Little Luke winning a corn-eating contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: When teenagers are turning into zombies Max and 99 go after their idol the Groovy Guru

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Thinking that a list of KAOS agents is Maxs little black book Max and his old Army buddy get dates with a couple of KAOS agents

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ goes undercover to infiltrate the auto ring that stole his rig while Sheriff Cordell detained him in jail on trumped-up charges Assisting BJ in his work is the attractive Tracy McBain a young idealistic and accident-prone peace officer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: Mchale 330
programme.desc: Mchale 330

programme.title: Mchale 333
programme.desc: Mchale 333

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When several people including Bea are attacked by a person wearing black Dan sets out to find out who and why Eventually he learns that Bea and all the other victims just came from a vacation in Mexico As Dan searches for the killer and other possible victims he meets a reporter who wants to do a story Dan reluctantly lets her join him

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeway is chosen to star in a new dog food ad campaign but the creator has a secret ingredient and will kill to hide it

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry Darryl and Darryl have their relationship turned upside down when Larry discovers he isnt the oldest brother

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joannas new friends decide to open an inn right next door and it ends up being such a success it steals all the Stratfords business

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Holowachuk wins the officers tournament and gloats until he finds out Gunny won it so often she stopped playing to give other people a chance at winning and it promptly drives him mad at who is a better pool player

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Dewey Morgan an old friend of Mitchs begs him to investigate his estranged wife Mackenna who doesnt seem to be her old self and Dewey suspects that she is an impostor

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo Carlos tries to make amends

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Its a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity and sets up shop in Las Vegas! But first Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from an lucha libre school and Carlos and Matt have to break up a Botox party when they go after a car owned by a upper class housewife Then on their first repo in Vegas a live tiger stands between the team and a truck and it seems like Vegas is more than they can handle If they complete their mission the payout could be enormous but will they be able to resist the temptations of Sin City

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Daan looses his contact with the the Taelon Commonality This causes him to change and Zoor instructs that Daan must be killed; because hes now considered a threat

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team act as watchdogs protecting a secret and unprecedented meeting of international alien experts where they suspect one of them may be an alien

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcanes mentor Dr Oliver Duncan is mysteriously killed everyone assumes Arcane is to blame Unfazed Arcane attempts to steal Duncans cold fusion research by romancing his daughter Louise who has plans of her own

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes genius is about to be publicly lauded in an autobiographical film But the actor playing him is found murdered in Arcanes trailer Who was the murderer - and was Arcane the intended victim

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter an eccentric and intelligent robot who is known as Brian the Brain Brians creator Captain Michael and his crew have all died in mysterious circumstances and Brian asks for the help of Koenig and his crew However it soon becomes very apparent that Brian is anything but harmless and was in fact responsible for the deaths of Captain Michael and his colleagues And he is ready to do the same to the Alphans unless they supply him with enough nuclear fuel to sustain him forever

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A lonely maiden woman in her mid 40s is stalked and targeted by a psychotic drifter Meanwhile she has a long term affair with a Canadian political leader Stone and Keller need to solve several mysteries

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs and company pretend to have found a means of synthesizing diamonds in order to con a dictator out of a priceless uncut diamond that will finance his government and secure his power

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: Killdozer
programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Two planets one full of people are on a collision course Gillian devises a potion to make the Monster Minds on the deserted planet grow only on one side The unevenly distributed weight will cause the planet to split avoiding a collision

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and all the wizards of the universe gather together to combine their powers in the orb which then receives strength from the night moon Saw Boss has captured the night moon and hopes to capture power for evil doing

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Priceless golden relics are mysteriously disappearing in Singapore causing the population to think they are doomed MASK discovers that VENOM has somehow found a way to liquefy gold so they can smuggle it through pipelines

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Brothers of Light and Shadow

programme.title: Teknoman

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Link and Zelda help the N team in building a mechanical dragon the purpose of which is to help them sneak in Dragons Den and put a stop to Dragonlords evil plan of hatching a deadly golden dragon

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Pit is heading for disappointment from his TV hero after he decides to aid him versus Mother Brain

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians must defeat the invading aliens as well as the Renegades

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick Matt and AJ are kidnapped at the heart of Gobotron but when they escape the Renegades they fall into the hands of Wrecks the leader of a gang of thieves who enters Matt in a bizarre form of gladiatorial combat
